MINI MINUTES: John Anthony Fetto, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff. Gregory McCormick, Esq. appearing for Defendant. Parties report that the case is not settled. The Arbitration Order to Show Cause is set to Case Management Conference Calendar to MAR-16-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes/K. Tom. Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff Sandra Colbert Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Docs
Off Calendar Aug-12-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. GREGORY H. MCCORMICK, ESQ. of Burnham Brown, Tel No. 510-444-6800 appearing for Defendants Supershuttle of San Francisco, Inc. and SFO Airporter, Inc.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Defense counsel stipulates to matter being heard by the pro tem judge. Matter argued by defense counsel and submitted. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ordered as follows: DEFENDANTS SUPERSHUTTLE OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC. AND SFO AIRPORTER, INC.'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff Sandra Colbert Responses To Special and Form Interrogatories, Set One, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set One is granted. Plaintiff shall serve verified responses on or before August 22, 2015. Defendants' request for sanctions is denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Thomas Cohen, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Defendants Supershuttle Of San Francisco, Inc. And Sfo Airporter, Inc.S Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff Sandra Colberts Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Docs
Off Calendar Aug-12-2015 Off Calendar
